rule: Feline leukemia virus (FeLV) vaccine is only indicated for cats
FIV is a feline-specific retrovirus — testing not indicated for other species
Dirofilaria immitis antigen test is validated for dogs only — not for other species
Canine distemper vaccine is indicated for dogs and ferrets only
Feline panleukopenia vaccine is species-specific — not indicated for other species
Canine Bordetella vaccine formulation is not approved for other species
MRI equipment bore size and positioning cannot accommodate small exotic species
CT anesthesia and positioning protocols not established for these species in standard practice
Echocardiography requires probe placement and acoustic windows not feasible on these species
Echocardiography requires probe placement and acoustic windows not feasible on these species
Systemic chemotherapy protocols are validated only for canine/feline patients
CHOP chemotherapy protocol is validated for canine and feline lymphoma only
Inhalant anesthesia cannot be safely administered to aquatic or ectothermic species
TPLO is a canine-specific orthopedic procedure based on canine tibial plateau anatomy
Total hip replacement implants are sized and designed for dogs — rarely performed in cats and not in exotic species
Laparoscopic equipment and technique not applicable for this species
OFA hip dysplasia evaluation is a canine-specific screening program
Canine blood products are species-specific — cross-species transfusion is contraindicated
Feline blood products are species-specific — cross-species transfusion is contraindicated
